text: Being here, I feel a curious blend of detachment and anticipation. The world around me is formed with glass, colors and screens—spaces of thinking and learning, but everyone is engrossed in their own dialogues and tasks. Am I a spectator or a participant in this pursuit of knowledge? I feel small compared to the institutional backdrop, yet quietly thrilled by the undercurrent of innovation that is hinted at on each wall and screen. It is inspiring, but I wonder if true understanding is only ever half-glimpsed in these moments of observation.
